summary: Tested Coach Mission Control dashboard refinements. All requested features working correctly: KPI cards showing 'NEED ATTENTION' (renamed from 'NEED ACTION'), 'Athletes Requiring Attention' section header (renamed from 'MY ATHLETES'), teal NEXT action pills in athlete rows, On Track section collapsed by default with count badge, Events Requiring Prep appears BEFORE Assigned Actions, severity badges on actions (REQUEST/ACKNOWLEDGED visible), Focus Mode toggle hides Events + Activity sections, Acknowledge/Resolve buttons functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Mission Control refinements tested at iteration 118. Key test-ids: coach-mission-control, kpi-value-my-athletes, kpi-value-need-attention, kpi-value-events-this-week, kpi-value-director-requests, roster-section, roster-athlete-{id}, toggle-on-track, director-actions-card, director-action-{id}, severity-{level}, ack-action-{id}, resolve-action-{id}, focus-mode-toggle. Login requires keyboard.press('Enter') to submit - button click may not work. Section order verified: Roster -> On Track -> Events Requiring Prep -> Assigned Actions.

feature_coverage.dashboard_loads_at_mission_control: PASS - Coach redirected to /mission-control after login
feature_coverage.kpi_need_attention: PASS - Renamed from 'NEED ACTION' to 'NEED ATTENTION', shows 5
feature_coverage.athlete_row_structure: PASS - Shows name, issue badge (MOMENTUM DROP, BLOCKER, ENGAGEMENT DROP), reason, NEXT action
feature_coverage.teal_next_action_pill: PASS - Visually confirmed teal background on NEXT actions
feature_coverage.on_track_collapsed_default: PASS - Collapsed by default with count badge (1)
feature_coverage.on_track_expandable: PASS - Expands on click showing healthy athletes
feature_coverage.events_requiring_prep_before_actions: PASS - Section order: Roster > On Track > Events Prep > Assigned Actions
feature_coverage.assigned_actions_severity_badges: PASS - REQUEST badges visible with data-testid='severity-request'
feature_coverage.action_row_structure: PASS - Shows athlete name, severity + status badges, bold title, explanation, source/date
feature_coverage.acknowledge_button: PASS - Clicking shows toast 'Acknowledged — you're on it'
feature_coverage.resolve_button: PASS - Opens modal with resolution form (note field, notify director checkbox, add follow-up option)
feature_coverage.focus_mode_toggle: PASS - Toggle changes text from 'Focus Mode' to 'Focus Mode On'
feature_coverage.focus_mode_hides_sections: PASS - Events + Activity sections hidden when Focus Mode enabled
feature_coverage.reduced_row_padding: PASS - Visually confirmed compact row styling

test_notes.login_method: Use keyboard.type() and keyboard.press('Enter') - direct button.click() may fail
test_notes.severity_badges_observed: Only 'Request' severity visible in current test data - Critical/Needs Review badges exist in code (SEVERITY_CONFIG) but no test data triggered them
test_notes.next_pill_detection: Code detection returned false but visually confirmed teal styling in screenshots - detection issue only
